why: Stars carry value: accrual credits them on order completion and redeem spends them for a coupon. Amounts must be server-authoritative and redeem must be race-safe (no double-spend). This is a credits + trust-boundary surface. mustStopBeforeFinalize is false because this phase touches no irreversible/outward-facing action (no deploy, no migration beyond existing tables); humanApprovalRequired flags that a human should sign off before the rewards surface ships to production.
